requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-knowledge (slug dCbFzRQGDr, canonical) — FR-K1..K28 + FR-K12a/K15a/K20a/K20b/K31b + NFR-K1..K13 (K11-13 draft amendment ENG-1933) + Memory fold-in FR-E1..E4 / AD-7/9/11; Architecture: orvex-studio-knowledge (slug azRwTCZMqw, canonical) A1..A12/A-bundle + cell-contract rules 1/3/4/5/6/10/11/13

sources.title: R-9: Search-Stack Consolidation Design (referenced; binding D-R9-1..5)

stories.title: [knowledge] Kafka Trigger subscription to the wiki.* CloudEvent catalog with orvexcell fail-closed
[knowledge] Thin-event ingest: engine export-pull resolver + version-guarded CAS upsert
[knowledge] Synchronous keyword-upsert hook /internal/v1/keyword-upsert with breaker
[knowledge] Chunking + embeddings pipeline (text_repr chunker, per-corpus model, content-hash skip)
[knowledge] Attachment ingestion via Tika with MIME allow-list, size cap, metadata-only fallback
[knowledge] Permission-change re-scope within freshness SLO (over-narrow only)
[knowledge] Ingestion failure handling: retry/backoff/DLQ + freshness watermark + staleness SLI

epics.title: [EPIC] knowledge: Projection store, multi-source model & vendor seam

stories.title: [knowledge] Postgres projection schema + RLS fail-closed tenancy backstop
[knowledge] Store-adapter seam (Upsert/Query/DeleteNamespace/DeleteDocs/AliasSwap) + conformance suite + memindex reference
[knowledge] Turbopuffer adapter, namespace-per-tenant hybrid store
[knowledge] Source-adapter contract registry + wiki source adapter (fail-closed on undeclared primitive)

epics.title: [EPIC] knowledge: Query & retrieval API, ranking, and read-path cache

stories.title: [knowledge] Query surface: /v1/query (keyword|semantic|hybrid), /v1/retrieve, /v1/related, /v1/duplicates, /v1/attachments/search
[knowledge] Hybrid ranking: RRF fusion + freshness + optional nil-safe rerank stage
[knowledge] Redis read-path cache with event-driven tag eviction
[knowledge] Query latency budgets + per-principal/tenant QoS fairness limits

epics.title: [EPIC] knowledge: Universal ACL choke point, auth & isolation

stories.title: [knowledge] Universal ACL post-filter: engine FR-13 ∩ token-scope, over-narrow prefilter, count-oracle-safe
[knowledge] FR-13 hot-path overload protection: single-flight + interactive/bulk bulkhead + rate contract
[knowledge] Auth verifier via lib: JWKS session + api-key, polymorphic {user|org} principal, no anonymous
[knowledge] Isolation probes: cross-tenant + intra-tenant-restricted zero-byte + count-oracle in CI & per-deploy

epics.title: [EPIC] knowledge: SSE gateway & Orvex CLI wire contract

stories.title: [knowledge] KafkaSink raw single-partition topic + standalone assigned SSE consumer (assign/seek)
[knowledge] SSE gateway wire contract: replay-then-tail, Last-Event-ID resume, heartbeats, control frames
[knowledge] CLI wire-contract deltas: /events/head, cursor semantics, legacy unprefixed names, 1 MiB frames, backoff
[knowledge] Events admin surfaces /api/orvex/events/{connections,log,settings}
[knowledge] Bundle builder /v1/bundles: pre-stream non-erasable egress audit + fail-closed export policy
[knowledge] Principal-bound bundle capability: GET /v1/bundles/:id ownership check (closes IDOR)
[knowledge] /v1/projection/delta cursor download: ACL-narrowed, epoch-bearing, ≥20 pages/s
[knowledge] Projection field set: content_pm parity ruling + lifecycle/verification/presentational + byte-stable markdown
[knowledge] Page-level ACL tombstones as hard-DELETE records on permission loss
[knowledge] CLI read verbs direct-to-query + projection parity claim
[knowledge] Idempotent rebuild step-APIs (namespace/walk/index-batch/delta-repull/alias-swap/retire) driven by central Temporal
[knowledge] Projection epochs + delta full-resync + RTO-budgeted resumable rebuild
[knowledge] Event-archive sink (S3 + Postgres append table) for long-horizon replay beyond Kafka retention
[knowledge] Purge FR-K27: delete every copy on workspace/user/space delete + zero-residual probe
[knowledge] Admin reindex API: enqueue rebuilds, inspect indexing lag & DLQ, trigger extraction retries
[knowledge] Liveness/readiness split per binary + Prometheus/OTel observability + residency
[knowledge] Cell-contract conformance: cluster-local DNS, cell-guard/421, healthz echoes, Idempotency-Key, tenant-move step-API
[knowledge] Studio corpora ingestion (studio.skill.*/memory.*/chat.*) via owner-scoped source adapters, per-corpus chunks/models
[knowledge] A12 ACL mechanics: owner-scoped admission, employer firewall, delegated-only, ingestion-side privacy exclusion
[knowledge] Memory retrieval namespace wall (AD-7 owner_scope) + per-card ordering & read-your-writes (AD-11)
[knowledge] Retrieval eval harness: recall@10 ≥ 0.80 + regression gate + raw-store-searchable + public benchmark
[knowledge] Outbound Memory sync — user-facing master→replica push to vendor native memories (per-vendor adapters, conflict policy, private-memory exclusion)
